new_terms.suggested_translation: 使用寿命 / 预计使用年限
new_terms.context: Refers to the accounting period over which GPUs are depreciated, linked to 'sweating assets'.
Used in the context of GPU valuation and market concerns over long-term asset worth.
Describes the ongoing shortage of available compute capacity.
The ability of Neocloud providers to maintain high rental prices due to scarcity.
Specific reference to TSMC's 3nm node production capacity for logic chips.
A key metric for tracking end-user demand in AI models.
